title: PG&E releases new plan on 2022 wildfire safety
text: Pacific Gas and Electric Corp. (PG&E) filed its 2022 Wildfire Mitigation Plan with state regulators on Friday and announced plans to "significantly accelerate the undergrounding of powerlines in high fire-risk areas.".

title: PG&E Finally Restores Dividends On Preferreds
text: PG&E Corp. is restoring the dividends on its eight series of preferred stock and paying 17 quarters of arrears.

title: First-of-its-Kind Technology Allows PG&E Customers to Safely and Easily Connect Backup Power to Their Homes
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As part of its work to build a stronger, more resilient energy grid for the hometowns it serves, PG&E successfully developed a first-of-its-kind personal microgrid backup power transfer meter device for customers that fully integrates into PG&E's existing electric SmartMeter system. The device provides customers with a more reliable solution for interconnecting backup power sources, such as portable generators or batteries, to power essential devices and

title: PG&E Corporation (PCG) CEO Patricia Poppe on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PG&E Corporation (PCG) CEO Patricia Poppe on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: PG&E Corp. (PCG) Q4 Earnings In Line, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: PG&E Corp's (PCG) Q4 adjusted earnings increase 33.3% from the year-ago quarter's reported figure. It expects to generate core earnings in the range of $1.07-$1.13 per share for 2022.

title: PG&E Corporation Delivers on Guidance for Full-Year 2021
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) recorded full-year losses of $102 million, or $0.05 per share and fourth-quarter 2021 income available for common shareholders of $472 million, or $0.22 per share, as reported in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP). This compares with losses attributable to common shareholders of $1.3 billion, or $1.05 per share, for the full year of 2020 and income available for common shareholders of $200 million, or

title: PG&E Corporation Stock: Facing Greater Dangers
text: PG&E stock should be avoided because of weak financials and increasing competitive threats. Numerous headwinds such as macroeconomic and demographic risks will negatively impact the company's performance.

title: PG&E (PCG) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: PG&E Corporation's (PCG) fourth-quarter results are likely to have had a mixed impact of weather conditions on its sales and an unfavorable restoration costs impact on its bottom line.

title: PG&E Deploys Advanced Methane Detection Technology for Gas Distribution Safety Survey
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As part of PG&E's ongoing commitment to provide customers with safe, reliable natural gas service, the company conducts comprehensive surveys of its gas distribution pipeline system. This year, PG&E will survey 1.2 million customer service lines, customer gas meters, and corresponding distribution pipeline.
